response:
Robert M. Fomon was **Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of E. F. Hutton & Co.** and **Chairman of the Board of Governors of the Pacific Stock Exchange**. He also served as **Governor of the New York Stock Exchange**. 

His connection to the **New York Stock Exchange (NYSE)** at 11 Wall Street, Lower Manhattan, was that he held **significant executive leadership roles** within the exchange, including serving as its Governor.
